instruction: Please set the priority on the Empire City Sports message about the Knicks and Rangers that's in my inbox.

rule_ref.rule_text: When triaging messages, she prefers marking sports and leisure updates as low priority rather than treating them like normal work traffic.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: Whenever a message is just sports or leisure chatter, I always mark it low priority.

attributes.subject: Knicks and Rangers this week
attributes.body: Local coverage on the Knicks road trip, Rangers line changes, and upcoming home dates.

attributes.subject: Safety review deck revisions
attributes.body: I updated the slide order and noted the remaining questions for the Thursday review.

attributes.subject: March discussion pick and venue poll
attributes.body: Vote on the next novel and whether to meet at the Upper West Side branch or online.
